productDisplayName: Puma Men's Speed Cat White Green Shoe
description: These white motorsport shoes from puma combine the best of Scuderia ferrari components with the ever fresh vulcanized look. The high tops come in long lasting leather uppers with breathable airmesh inserts on the sides making it a great combination of form and function. The rubber outsoles with the tyre pattern are great for the race course.UpperSynthetic leather and mesh upper with strategically placed overlaysHigh collar for ankle supportEmbroidered branding on the upperCentral lace-ups for a customised FitFormstripe appliqued on the sideMidsolePU foxing on the forefoot and TPU midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with 3D branding on the midfoot and V-shaped grooves for grip
